_README: Held-out gold labels for the cast-goal-classifier corpus eval (Phase 2, sp4). HEADLESS PROVENANCE: hand-labeled by the sp4 runner from title + writeup using the family rubric in cast-goal-classifier.md — NOT owner-validated. The owner must review these labels (and ideally expand the corpus to 25-40 across workspaces) before any model-tier decision is treated as final. Stubs whose body is the literal 'Finish brainstorming/initial requirements' placeholder carry no actionable signal, so their honest gold is random_idea (the floor); title-implied alternatives are recorded in 'note' for confusion analysis.

cast-subagent-and-skill-capture.note: Substantial new observability capability: capture Task()-dispatched subagents + skills in agent_runs; has scope, DB change, UI change, out-of-scope, open questions. alt=generic.

cast-ui-test-children-completion.note: Test harness is broken (no child writes output.json, test times out); has a repro; investigation needed -> unknown_cause. alt=testing_qa.

child-delegation-integration-tests.note: Re-establish integration-test discipline for child delegation across both transports; tests-first then fix. Dominant framing is test coverage. alt=bug_fix.

comprehensive-ui-test.note: Plan + execute Playwright UI tests across all screens, re-runnable anytime. alt=new_initiative.

product-revamp-diecast.note: Large product revamp / vision mockup with target users, principles, vision; substantial new direction. Genuinely ambiguous with pilot_poc ('mock up to explore vision'). alt=pilot_poc.

refine-requirements-v2.note: Substantial feature evolution of cast-refine-requirements (WHAT/HOW split, HTML render, classification, comments, versioning, source-of-truth). alt=refactor_migration.

revamp-diecast.note: Improve diecast and launch v2; intent is clear but framed as 'understand/prioritize directions' + 'grill me', so borderline with the floor. alt=random_idea.

capture-user-invocations-as-runs.note: Empty placeholder body. Title implies a feature (new_initiative) but no actionable signal in the writeup.

cast-ui-harness-layered-fixes.note: Empty placeholder body. Title implies bug_fix ('fixes') but no signal.

child-delegation-e2e.note: Empty placeholder body, no title. e2e implies testing_qa but no signal.

improved-first-launch.note: Empty placeholder body. Title implies an improvement/initiative but no signal.

manual-test.note: Empty placeholder body. Title implies testing_qa but no signal.

runs-threaded-tree.note: Empty placeholder body. Title implies a feature but no signal.

test-python-scaffolding.note: Empty placeholder body. Title implies testing_qa/new_initiative but no signal.
